diary_entries.entry: Year 56 on Mars. Underground cave system located. Morale is hopeful. We have 584 food units left.
Year 56 on Mars. Underground cave system located. Morale is hopeful. We have 584 food units left.
Population: 27. Underground cave system located. I spent the year on sabotage. Closest to Iris.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 56): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
